column1: # Each row is one clipping — an ad
# anything in print about or from Winkleman Travel. Image files live in
# The page renders all clippings in a single chronological grid sorted
# by date. Feature articles span the full width of the grid; regular ads
# auto-generated from each row's slug — same slug always produces the

column2: but the composition feels naturally varied.

column1: #   title        short headline shown in caption
#   date         YYYY-MM-DD; sorts the corkboard and renders as
#   tilt         OPTIONAL. Leave blank or 0 to auto-generate a stable random
#                tilt from the slug. Set explicitly (e.g. -3) to override.
#   offset_y     OPTIONAL. Same as tilt — blank or 0 auto-generates.
#   style        OPTIONAL. "pin" or "tape". Blank auto-picks based on slug.
#   notes        optional internal notes — ignored by the site
# Publication codes recognized today (add more in PUBLICATION_NAMES in ads.html):
#   options  Options · Rhode Island LGBTQ+ Magazine
# Lines starting with # are ignored. The CSV row order doesn't matter —
# the page sorts everything by date.
# IMPORTANT: avoid editing this file in Excel or Numbers if you can.
# Spreadsheet apps mangle CSV comments. Use a plain text editor.
